Order reference 'APM 1383675' in certificate matches order '1383675-01-01-01' in invoice

Land verification via indirect identifiers (VAT prefix SE)

Direct exact match on both name and country.

checkpoint_results.certificate_value: Al Ghurair Printing and Publishing LLC, DIC Plant Warehouse # 532-222, Saih Shuaib 3, Dubai Industrial City, PO Box 5613, Dubai, United Arab Emirates
checkpoint_results.invoice_value: Köpare: Braillo Norway AS, Wesselsvei 100, 7502 STJØRDAL, Norge; Leveransadress: Seafront Logistics AS, Kongshavnveien 29, 0193 Oslo, Norge

comparison_steps.description: Identify primary billing field in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Invoice has 'Köpare' (Buyer) field: 'Braillo Norway AS' in Norway. This is the primary billing party.
Delivery address is 'Seafront Logistics AS' in Oslo, Norway. Not matching certificate consignee.

comparison_steps.description: Search for 'Al Ghurair Printing and Publishing LLC' anywhere in invoice
comparison_steps.result: NOT FOUND - The name 'Al Ghurair' does not appear anywhere in the invoice text.

MISMATCH - Certificate consignee 'Al Ghurair Printing and Publishing LLC' (UAE) cannot be identified anywhere in the invoice. Invoice buyer is 'Braillo Norway AS' (Norway). These are completely different legal entities in different countries.
MISMATCH - Certificate states 'United Arab Emirates', invoice buyer is in 'Norge' (Norway). No UAE entity or address found in invoice.

rules_applied.rule_description: Priority order for consignee identification - primary billing field (Köpare/Buyer) checked first
rules_applied.outcome: MISMATCH - Certificate consignee not found in primary billing field

rules_applied.rule_description: Broader search for consignee in invoice including delivery address, dealer, importer fields
rules_applied.outcome: MISMATCH - 'Al Ghurair Printing and Publishing LLC' not found anywhere in invoice

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee is 'Al Ghurair Printing and Publishing LLC' located in Dubai, United Arab Emirates. The invoice's buyer (Köpare) is 'Braillo Norway AS' located in Stjørdal, Norway. The delivery address is 'Seafront Logistics AS' in Oslo, Norway. Neither the name 'Al Ghurair' nor any UAE address appears anywhere in the invoice. The entities are completely different: different company names, different countries (UAE vs Norway). This is a clear MISMATCH on both name and country. No normalization rule can bridge this gap — these are fundamentally different legal entities.

checkpoint_results.certificate_value:
Uncoated paper for printing
1) 138 reels, Amber Graphic 150gsm, 290 mm

comparison_steps.description: Check for article numbers in certificate
comparison_steps.result: No explicit article numbers found in certificate. Proceed to Priority 2.
MATCH - 'Amber Graphic 150gsm, 290 mm' in certificate matches 'Amber Graphic 150 g/m², 290 mm' in invoice. The product identity is 'Amber Graphic' at 150 gsm, 290 mm width.

'Uncoated paper for printing' is a general product category; '138 reels' is packaging information. The core product identity 'Amber Graphic 150gsm 290 mm' is present in both documents. '150gsm' and '150 g/m²' are equivalent notations for grams per square meter.

rules_applied.rule_description: Controlled text matching - identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning identified as 'Amber Graphic 150gsm 290 mm'
Non-identity-bearing additions - 'Uncoated paper for printing' is a product category descriptor, not identity-bearing

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate goods description: 'Uncoated paper for printing, 1) 138 reels, Amber Graphic 150gsm, 290 mm'. Invoice goods: 'Amber Graphic 150 g/m², Rullbredd 290 mm'. The identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning is 'Amber Graphic 150gsm 290 mm'. In the invoice, 'Amber Graphic 150 g/m²' and '290 mm' are present. '150gsm' equals '150 g/m²' (grams per square meter — standard paper weight notation). '290 mm' matches exactly. 'Uncoated paper for printing' is a general product category description that does not change the identity of the specific product. '138 reels' is a packaging/quantity descriptor. The core product identity matches between both documents.

comparison_steps.description: Box 7 contains 'Gross kgs 26642 kgs' — this is the verifieringsgrundande quantity
Search for numeric value 26642 in invoice
comparison_steps.result: MATCH - Invoice states 'Total kgs Gross 26 642'. After thousands separator normalization (removing space): 26642 matches exactly.

comparison_steps.description: Invoice value '26 642' normalized to '26642' by removing space as thousands separator
comparison_steps.result: Both values are integers. Space is used as thousands separator. Normalization conditions met.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate specifies 'Gross kgs'. Invoice specifies 'Total kgs Gross'.
comparison_steps.result: Both explicitly state Gross Weight in KG. Category matches.

rules_applied.rule_description: Förekomstkontroll - numeric value identified in invoice
Thousands separator normalization - space removed from '26 642' to get '26642'
Weight category verification - both documents state Gross Weight

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7: 'Gross kgs 26642 kgs'. This is the verifieringsgrundande quantity per rule 4.4.2.1. Invoice states 'Total kgs Gross 26 642'. After applying thousands separator normalization (4.4.3.3) — removing the space in '26 642' to get '26642' — the numeric values match exactly. Both documents explicitly state Gross Weight in KG. The weight category matches. Additionally, the invoice Net Weight (26 504 kgs) does not contradict the Gross Weight value — it is lower as expected. Exact match on numeric value, unit, and weight category.

checkpoint_results.invoice_value: Ursprungsland: Sverige; EU preferential origin declaration

comparison_steps.description: Search for explicit origin fields in invoice
comparison_steps.result: Found 'Ursprungsland Sverige' (dedicated origin field) and EU preferential origin exporter declaration.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate: 'EU, Sweden'. Invoice: 'Sverige' + 'European Union preferential origin'
comparison_steps.result: 'Sverige' = 'Sweden' after language normalization. EU origin confirmed by exporter declaration.

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'EU, Sweden'. Invoice has explicit 'Ursprungsland Sverige' and EU preferential origin declaration.
comparison_steps.result: MATCH via rule 4.5.4.2.1 — EU combined with one specific EU member state, and invoice confirms both EU origin and Sweden explicitly.

rules_applied.rule_description: EU + one specific EU member state in certificate, invoice confirms both EU preferential origin and Sweden
EU member state equivalence - Sweden is EU member state

checkpoint_results.debug_explanation: Certificate origin field (box 3): 'EU, Sweden'. Invoice has a dedicated 'Ursprungsland' (Country of Origin) field stating 'Sverige' (Sweden in Swedish). Additionally, the invoice contains an exporter declaration: 'these products are of European Union preferential origin.' Certificate claims two origins: (1) EU and (2) Sweden. For Sweden: 'Sverige' in the invoice's dedicated origin field matches 'Sweden' after language normalization. For EU: The exporter declaration explicitly states 'European Union preferential origin', confirming EU origin. Per rule 4.5.4.2.1, when the certificate states 'EU [country]' (EU combined with one specific EU member state) and the invoice contains an explicit EU origin statement in a dedicated field, this is MATCH. Both origin claims are verified: Sweden via the dedicated origin field, and EU via the exporter declaration. No non-EU origins found in the invoice.

evidence.raw_text:
The exporter of the products covered by this document / custom authorization
no. SE/GBG/002022 declares that except where otherwise clearly indicated,
these products are of European Union preferential origin.

rule_evaluation_log.notes: No LC reference found in certificate. References 'Order APM 1383675' and 'Order 4834 / TI 91193 / 5301-PO-1021246' are order references, not LC references.
Document A is certificate file, Document B is invoice file. Single certificate (Original) and single invoice (30025992). Clear pairing.
Criteria met: Consignor 'Arctic Paper Munkedals AB' matches invoice issuer. Order reference 1383675 corroborates.
Consignor 'Arctic Paper Munkedals AB' found directly as invoice issuer in header, seller block, and exporter declaration.
VAT prefix SE in SE556000527301 confirms Sweden. Also 'Sverige' stated explicitly in seller block.
Primary billing field 'Köpare' contains 'Braillo Norway AS' (Norway). Certificate consignee is 'Al Ghurair Printing and Publishing LLC' (UAE). Completely different entities.
Ship-To is 'Seafront Logistics AS' in Oslo, Norway. Certificate consignee is 'Al Ghurair Printing and Publishing LLC' in UAE. No match in Ship-To either.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Broader search for consignee in invoice
rule_evaluation_log.notes: 'Al Ghurair Printing and Publishing LLC' not found anywhere in invoice. Neither 'Al Ghurair', 'Ghurair', 'DIC Plant', 'Dubai', nor 'United Arab Emirates' appear in the invoice.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: Controlled text matching for goods description
rule_evaluation_log.notes: Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'Amber Graphic 150gsm 290 mm' matches 'Amber Graphic 150 g/m² 290 mm' in invoice.
26642 kgs Gross in certificate matches 'Total kgs Gross 26 642' in invoice after thousands separator normalization.
Space in '26 642' treated as thousands separator. Both values are integers.

rule_evaluation_log.rule_description: EU + one specific EU member state verification
rule_evaluation_log.notes: Certificate: 'EU, Sweden'. Invoice: 'Ursprungsland Sverige' + EU preferential origin declaration. Both EU and Sweden confirmed.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Certifikatet anger mottagaren som Al Ghurair Printing and Publishing LLC i Dubai, Förenade Arabemiraten, men fakturan är ställd till Braillo Norway AS i Stjørdal, Norge. Mottagarens namn och land i certifikatet kan inte återfinnas någonstans i fakturan. Övriga kontrollpunkter (avsändare, varubeskrivning, kvantitet och ursprungsland) stämmer överens.
blocking_issues: Consignee MISMATCH: Certificate states 'Al Ghurair Printing and Publishing LLC' (UAE) but invoice buyer is 'Braillo Norway AS' (Norway). The certificate consignee cannot be identified anywhere in the invoice.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot Faktura

sections.certificate_value: Arctic Paper Munkedals AB, SE-455 81, MUNKEDAL, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Arctic Paper Munkedals AB, 455 81 Munkedal, Sverige (Säljare/Seller block)
sections.rule_applied: Direkt namnmatchning (4.1.0) med landverifiering via explicit adress och VAT-prefix SE (4.1.2.1)
sections.motivation: Företagsnamnet 'Arctic Paper Munkedals AB' finns exakt i fakturans sidhuvud, säljarblock och exportörsdeklaration. Landet 'Sweden' bekräftas av 'Sverige' i säljarblocket samt VAT-prefix SE i SE556000527301. Exakt matchning.

sections.certificate_value: Al Ghurair Printing and Publishing LLC, DIC Plant Warehouse # 532-222, Saih Shuaib 3, Dubai Industrial City, PO Box 5613, Dubai, United Arab Emirates
sections.invoice_value: Köpare: Braillo Norway AS, Wesselsvei 100, 7502 STJØRDAL, Norge
sections.rule_applied: Prioritetsordning 4.2.0.2 – primärt faktureringsfält 'Köpare' kontrollerat. Bredare sökning 4.2.0.1 genomförd i hela fakturan.
sections.motivation: Certifikatets mottagare 'Al Ghurair Printing and Publishing LLC' i Förenade Arabemiraten kan inte identifieras någonstans i fakturan. Fakturans köpare är 'Braillo Norway AS' i Norge. Leveransadressen avser 'Seafront Logistics AS' i Oslo, Norge. Varken företagsnamnet, staden Dubai eller landet UAE förekommer i fakturan. Helt olika juridiska parter i olika länder. MISMATCH.

sections.certificate_value:
Uncoated paper for printing
1) 138 reels, Amber Graphic 150gsm, 290 mm
sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning (4.3.3) – identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'Amber Graphic 150gsm 290 mm' identifierad i båda dokumenten
sections.motivation: Den identitetsbärande huvudbeteckningen 'Amber Graphic 150gsm 290 mm' kan identifieras i fakturan som 'Amber Graphic 150 g/m² 290 mm'. '150gsm' och '150 g/m²' är ekvivalenta notationer för gramvikt per kvadratmeter. Rullbredd 290 mm matchar exakt. 'Uncoated paper for printing' är en generell produktkategoribeskrivning som inte ändrar produktens identitet. MATCH.

Certifikatets box 7 anger 'Gross kgs 26642 kgs'. Fakturan anger 'Total kgs Gross 26 642'. Efter normalisering av tusentalsavskiljare (mellanslag borttaget från '26 642') matchar det numeriska värdet 26642 exakt. Viktkategori Gross Weight anges explicit i båda dokumenten. Enhet KG anges i båda. Exakt matchning.

sections.invoice_value: Ursprungsland: Sverige; Exporter declaration: European Union preferential origin
sections.rule_applied: EU-normalisering (4.5.4.2.1) – EU + ett specifikt EU-medlemsland, bekräftat av dedikerat ursprungsfält och exportörsdeklaration
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger 'EU, Sweden' som ursprung. Fakturan har ett dedikerat fält 'Ursprungsland' som anger 'Sverige' (= Sweden efter språknormalisering). Fakturan innehåller även en exportörsdeklaration som uttryckligen anger 'European Union preferential origin'. Certifikatets två ursprungsangivelser — EU och Sweden — är båda verifierade: Sweden via det dedikerade ursprungsfältet, EU via exportörsdeklarationen. Inga icke-EU-ursprungsländer förekommer i fakturan. MATCH.

output_quality_checks.consistency_check_details: One checkpoint (4.2 Consignee) has status MISMATCH → comparison_result is NOT_IDENTICAL → workflow_recommendation is MANUAL_HANDLING_REQUIRED. Consistency verified. All MATCH checkpoints have confidence ≥ 0.85. Motivations align with statuses. No contradictions detected in final review.
